{# contacts_list.html — Global vendor-contacts list (cross-vendor). View-open (require_user); blacklisted vendors excluded (mirrors /api/vendor-contacts/bulk). Search + sort + paginate. Receives: contacts (VendorContact[] with .vendor_card loaded), search, sort, dir, total, limit, offset. Called by: vendor_contacts_partial route (htmx_views.py). Depends on: brand palette, timeago filter, .table-cell / .compact-cell utilities. #}

Vendor Contacts

{{ total }} contact{{ "s" if total != 1 }}

Vendors

{% if contacts %}
{% for c in contacts %} {% set vendor = c.vendor_card %} {% endfor %}
Name Vendor Title Email Phone Last contact

{{ c.full_name or "—" }}

{% if c.is_primary %}Primary{% endif %} 		{{ vendor.display_name if vendor else "Unknown" }} {{ c.title or "—" }} {{ c.email or "—" }} {{ c.phone or c.phone_mobile or "—" }} {{ c.last_interaction_at|timeago if c.last_interaction_at else "—" }}
{# Pagination #} {% if total > limit %}
{% if offset > 0 %} Prev {% endif %} {{ offset + 1 }}–{{ [offset + limit, total]|min }} of {{ total }} {% if offset + limit < total %} Next {% endif %}
{% endif %} {% else %}

No vendor contacts found

{% endif %}
